source: I will upload the launch brief, meeting notes, a draft customer FAQ, and product screenshots. Use them for a sharp launch-readiness triage. Identify launch risks, inconsistencies, customer misunderstandings, and unsupported team assumptions. Provide a practical launch checklist, a concise internal risk memo, a clear customer-facing FAQ, and a summary I can share internally. Highlight conflicts directly and do not invent missing details.
notes: Seeded from the 2026-04-24 launch-triage failure family.
